title: MCP Servers
description: Model Context Protocol servers and their tools

items.name: list_agent_templates
items.description: List available agent templates for quick starts.

items.name: get_agent_template
items.description: Get full details of an agent template.

properties.params: template_id: str

items.name: create_agent_from_template
items.description: Create an agent configuration from a template.

properties.params:
template_id: str,
    name: Optional[str] = None,
    additional_tools: Optional[str] = None

items.name: design_custom_agent
items.description: Design a custom agent from a natural language description.

properties.params:
description: str,
    tools: Optional[str] = None

items.name: generate_agent_code
items.description: Generate deployable code from an agent specification.

properties.params: spec_json: str

items.name: deploy_agent
items.description: Deploy an agent to the native workflow engine.

properties.params: spec_json: str

items.name: list_available_tools
items.description: List all available MCP tools that can be used in agent workflows.

items.name: alertmanager_get_alerts
items.description: Get current alerts from Alertmanager.

properties.params:
active: bool = Field(default=True, description="Include active alerts"),
    silenced: bool = Field(default=False, description="Include silenced alerts"),
    inhibited: bool = Field(default=False, description="Include inhibited alerts"),
    filter: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Label filter (e.g., 'severity=critical', 'alertname=HighMemory')")

items.name: alertmanager_get_alert_groups
items.description: Get alerts grouped by their labels.

items.name: alertmanager_get_silences
items.description: Get all silences from Alertmanager.

properties.params: filter: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Label filter for silences")

items.name: alertmanager_create_silence
items.description: Create a silence for an alert.

properties.params:
alertname: str = Field(description="Alert name to silence (exact match)"),
    duration: str = Field(default="2h", description="Duration of silence (e.g., '30m', '2h', '1d')"),
    comment: str = Field(description="Reason for silencing this alert"),
    created_by: str = Field(default="OpenAgentic AI", description="Who is creating this silence"),
    additional_matchers: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Additional matchers as JSON array, e.g., '[{\"name\":\"severity\",\"value\":\"warning\"}]'")

items.name: alertmanager_delete_silence
items.description: Delete/expire a silence.

properties.params: silence_id: str = Field(description="ID of the silence to delete/expire")

items.name: alertmanager_silence_by_labels
items.description: Create a silence matching multiple labels.

properties.params:
labels: str = Field(description="JSON object of label matchers (e.g., '{\"namespace\":\"staging\",\"severity\":\"warning\"}')"),
    duration: str = Field(default="2h", description="Duration of silence"),
    comment: str = Field(description="Reason for silencing"),
    created_by: str = Field(default="OpenAgentic AI", description="Who is creating this silence"),
    is_regex: bool = Field(default=False, description="Treat label values as regex patterns")

items.name: alertmanager_get_receivers
items.description: Get all configured notification receivers.

items.name: alertmanager_status
items.description: Get Alertmanager cluster status.

items.name: alertmanager_summary
items.description: Get a quick summary of current alert status.

items.name: call_aws
items.description: Execute AWS CLI commands with validation and proper error handling.

properties.params:
cli_command: Annotated[str, Field(description='The complete AWS CLI command to execute. MUST start with "aws"')],
    ctx: Context,
    max_results: Annotated[Optional[int], Field(description='Optional limit for number of results')] = None,
    meta: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None

items.name: suggest_aws_commands
items.description: Suggest AWS CLI commands based on a natural language query.

properties.params:
query: Annotated[str, Field(description='A natural language description of what you want to do in AWS', max_length=2000)],
    ctx: Context,
    meta: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None

items.name: aws_list_accounts
items.description: List AWS accounts accessible to the current user via Identity Center.

properties.params: meta: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None

items.name: aws_identity
items.description: Get your current AWS identity (who am I?).

properties.params: meta: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None

items.name: aws_cost_summary
items.description: Get a summary of your AWS costs for a specified number of days.

properties.params:
days: Annotated[int, Field(description='Number of days to analyze (default: 30)', default=30)] = 30,
    meta: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None

items.name: aws_cost_by_service
items.description: Get a breakdown of your AWS costs grouped by a dimension.

properties.params:
days: Annotated[int, Field(description='Number of days to analyze (default: 30)', default=30)] = 30,
    group_by: Annotated[str, Field(description='Group dimension: SERVICE, REGION, LINKED_ACCOUNT, USAGE_TYPE, INSTANCE_TYPE (default: SERVICE)', default='SERVICE')] = 'SERVICE',
    granularity: Annotated[str, Field(description='Time granularity: DAILY, MONTHLY (default: MONTHLY)', default='MONTHLY')] = 'MONTHLY',
    meta: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None

items.name: gcp_api_help
items.description: Get help on using the GCP MCP tools.

items.name: get_user
items.description: Get information about the authenticated GitHub user.

properties.params: meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: list_repos
items.description: List GitHub repositories for the authenticated user.

properties.params:
type: str = "all",
    sort: str = "updated",
    direction: str = "desc",
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: get_repo
items.description: Get details about a specific repository.

properties.params: owner: str, repo: str, meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: search_repos
items.description: Search for repositories on GitHub.

properties.params:
query: str,
    sort: str = "best-match",
    order: str = "desc",
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: list_branches
items.description: List branches in a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    protected: Optional[bool] = None,
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: get_file_contents
items.description: Get contents of a file in a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    path: str,
    ref: Optional[str] = None,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: list_issues
items.description: List issues in a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    state: str = "open",
    sort: str = "created",
    direction: str = "desc",
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    labels: Optional[str] = None,
    assignee: Optional[str] = None,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: get_issue
items.description: Get details about a specific issue.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    issue_number: int,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: create_issue
items.description: Create a new issue in a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    title: str,
    body: Optional[str] = None,
    labels: Optional[list] = None,
    assignees: Optional[list] = None,
    milestone: Optional[int] = None,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: update_issue
items.description: Update an existing issue.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    issue_number: int,
    title: Optional[str] = None,
    body: Optional[str] = None,
    state: Optional[str] = None,
    labels: Optional[list] = None,
    assignees: Optional[list] = None,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: list_pull_requests
items.description: List pull requests in a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    state: str = "open",
    sort: str = "created",
    direction: str = "desc",
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    base: Optional[str] = None,
    head: Optional[str] = None,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: get_pull_request
items.description: Get details about a specific pull request.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    pull_number: int,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: create_pull_request
items.description: Create a new pull request.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    title: str,
    head: str,
    base: str,
    body: Optional[str] = None,
    draft: bool = False,
    maintainer_can_modify: bool = True,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: search_code
items.description: Search for code across GitHub repositories.

properties.params:
query: str,
    sort: Optional[str] = None,
    order: str = "desc",
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: list_workflows
items.description: List GitHub Actions workflows in a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: get_workflow_runs
items.description: Get workflow runs for a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    workflow_id: Optional[str] = None,
    status: Optional[str] = None,
    branch: Optional[str] = None,
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: trigger_workflow
items.description: Trigger a workflow dispatch event.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    workflow_id: str,
    ref: str,
    inputs: Optional[dict] = None,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: list_commits
items.description: List commits in a repository.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    sha: Optional[str] = None,
    path: Optional[str] = None,
    author: Optional[str] = None,
    since: Optional[str] = None,
    until: Optional[str] = None,
    per_page: int = 30,
    page: int = 1,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: get_commit
items.description: Get details about a specific commit.

properties.params:
owner: str,
    repo: str,
    commit_sha: str,
    meta: Optional[dict] = None

items.name: incident_create
items.description: Create a new incident.

properties.params:
title: str = Field(description="Short title describing the incident"),
    description: str = Field(description="Detailed description of what's happening"),
    severity: str = Field(description="Severity level: sev1 (critical), sev2 (major), sev3 (minor), sev4 (low)"),
    service: str = Field(description="Affected service or system"),
    impact: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Description of business/user impact"),
    related_alerts: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Comma-separated list of related alert names"),
    tags: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Comma-separated list of tags")

items.name: incident_list
items.description: List incidents with optional filters.

properties.params:
status: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Filter by status (open, investigating, identified, mitigating, resolved, closed)"),
    severity: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Filter by severity (sev1, sev2, sev3, sev4)"),
    service: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Filter by service name"),
    limit: int = Field(default=20, description="Maximum number of incidents to return")

items.name: incident_get
items.description: Get detailed information about a specific incident.

properties.params: id: str = Field(description="Incident ID (e.g., INC-20240115-0001)")

items.name: incident_update_status
items.description: Update the status of an incident.

properties.params:
id: str = Field(description="Incident ID"),
    status: str = Field(description="New status: investigating, identified, mitigating, resolved"),
    note: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Optional note explaining the status change")

items.name: incident_assign
items.description: Assign an incident to a person.

properties.params:
id: str = Field(description="Incident ID"),
    assignee: str = Field(description="Name or email of person to assign")

items.name: incident_add_note
items.description: Add a note or update to an incident timeline.

properties.params:
id: str = Field(description="Incident ID"),
    note: str = Field(description="Update note or finding"),
    action_type: str = Field(default="UPDATE", description="Action type: UPDATE, FINDING, ACTION_TAKEN, ESCALATION")

items.name: incident_escalate
items.description: Escalate an incident to a higher severity.

properties.params:
id: str = Field(description="Incident ID"),
    new_severity: str = Field(description="New severity level (sev1, sev2, sev3)"),
    reason: str = Field(description="Reason for escalation")

items.name: incident_resolve
items.description: Resolve an incident with resolution details.

properties.params:
id: str = Field(description="Incident ID"),
    resolution: str = Field(description="Description of how the incident was resolved"),
    root_cause: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Root cause if identified")

items.name: incident_close
items.description: Close an incident after resolution is confirmed.

properties.params:
id: str = Field(description="Incident ID"),
    final_note: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Final closing note")

items.name: incident_link_runbook
items.description: Link a runbook execution to an incident.

properties.params:
id: str = Field(description="Incident ID"),
    runbook: str = Field(description="Name of runbook that was executed"),
    result: str = Field(description="Result of runbook execution (success/failed)")

items.name: incident_summary
items.description: Get a summary of current incident status.

items.name: search_tool_documentation
items.description: Search for tool usage documentation and guidance.

properties.params: query: str, top_k: int = 5

items.name: get_tool_examples
items.description: Get detailed usage examples for a specific tool.

properties.params: tool_name: str

items.name: suggest_tools_for_task
items.description: Given a task description, suggest which tools to use and how.

properties.params: task_description: str = "", task: str = ""

items.name: list_available_mcps
items.description: List all available MCP servers and their capabilities.

items.name: loki_query
items.description: Query logs from Loki using LogQL.

properties.params:
query: str = Field(description="LogQL query to execute (e.g., '{app=\"nginx\"}', '{namespace=\"openagentic\"} |= \"error\"')"),
    limit: int = Field(default=100, description="Maximum number of log lines to return (default: 100, max: 5000)"),
    start: str = Field(default="1h", description="Start time (e.g., '1h', '30m', '1d', or RFC3339 timestamp)"),
    end: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="End time (defaults to now)")

items.name: loki_search_errors
items.description: Search for error logs across the system.

properties.params:
namespace: str = Field(default="", description="Kubernetes namespace to search (leave empty for all)"),
    app: str = Field(default="", description="Application/container name to filter"),
    time_range: str = Field(default="1h", description="Time range to search (e.g., '30m', '1h', '6h', '1d')"),
    limit: int = Field(default=200, description="Maximum number of log lines")

items.name: loki_tail
items.description: Get the most recent log lines (like 'tail -f').

properties.params:
query: str = Field(description="LogQL query for the stream to tail"),
    lines: int = Field(default=50, description="Number of recent lines to show (max: 500)")

items.name: loki_labels
items.description: List all available label names in Loki.

items.name: loki_label_values
items.description: Get all values for a specific label.

properties.params: label: str = Field(description="Label name to get values for (e.g., 'namespace', 'app', 'pod')")

items.name: loki_count_logs
items.description: Count log entries over time.

properties.params:
query: str = Field(description="LogQL stream selector (e.g., '{app=\"nginx\"}')"),
    time_range: str = Field(default="1h", description="Time range to count over"),
    interval: str = Field(default="5m", description="Interval for counting (e.g., '1m', '5m', '15m')")

items.name: loki_log_rate
items.description: Calculate log rate (lines per second) over time.

properties.params:
query: str = Field(description="LogQL stream selector"),
    time_range: str = Field(default="1h", description="Time range to analyze"),
    interval: str = Field(default="1m", description="Rate calculation interval")

items.name: loki_context
items.description: Get log context around a specific log entry.

properties.params:
query: str = Field(description="LogQL query that matches the log line of interest"),
    timestamp: str = Field(description="Timestamp of the log line (RFC3339 or Unix nanoseconds)"),
    before: int = Field(default=10, description="Number of lines before the match"),
    after: int = Field(default=10, description="Number of lines after the match")

items.name: loki_streams
items.description: List all active log streams in Loki.

items.name: prometheus_query
items.description: Execute an instant PromQL query against Prometheus to check infrastructure metrics.

properties.params:
query: str = Field(description="PromQL query to execute (e.g., 'http_requests_total', 'rate(http_requests_total[5m])')"),
    time: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Evaluation timestamp (RFC3339 or Unix timestamp). Defaults to current time.")

items.name: prometheus_query_range
items.description: Execute a range PromQL query against Prometheus for time-series analysis.

properties.params:
query: str = Field(description="PromQL query to execute"),
    start: str = Field(description="Start timestamp (RFC3339 or Unix timestamp, e.g., '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' or '1704067200')"),
    end: str = Field(description="End timestamp (RFC3339 or Unix timestamp)"),
    step: str = Field(default="60s", description="Query resolution step (e.g., '15s', '1m', '5m')")

items.name: prometheus_alerts
items.description: Get all active alerts from Prometheus for incident detection.

items.name: prometheus_targets
items.description: Get all Prometheus scrape targets and their health status.

items.name: prometheus_metrics_list
items.description: List all available Prometheus metric names for discovery.

properties.params: filter: Optional[str] = Field(default=None, description="Optional filter pattern to match metric names (e.g., 'http_' or 'memory')")

items.name: prometheus_metric_info
items.description: Get metadata and current values for a specific metric.

properties.params: metric: str = Field(description="Name of the metric to get info about")

items.name: prometheus_rules
items.description: Get all alerting and recording rules from Prometheus.

items.name: prometheus_health_summary
items.description: Get a quick health summary of the monitored services.

items.name: runbook_list
items.description: List all available runbooks.

items.name: runbook_describe
items.description: Get detailed information about a runbook.

properties.params: runbook: str = Field(description="Name of the runbook to describe")

items.name: runbook_execute
items.description: Execute a runbook with the given parameters.

properties.params:
runbook: str = Field(description="Name of the runbook to execute"),
    params: str = Field(description="Parameters as JSON object (e.g., '{\"pod_name\": \"nginx\", \"namespace\": \"default\"}')")

items.name: runbook_history
items.description: Get history of runbook executions.

properties.params: limit: int = Field(default=10, description="Number of recent executions to show")

items.name: runbook_quick_restart
items.description: Quick helper to restart a service (rolling restart).

properties.params:
service: str = Field(description="Service/deployment name to restart"),
    namespace: str = Field(default="openagentic", description="Kubernetes namespace")

items.name: runbook_quick_scale
items.description: Quick helper to scale a deployment.

items.name: runbook_quick_diagnostics
items.description: Quick helper to collect diagnostics for a service.

properties.params:
service: str = Field(description="Service/deployment name to diagnose"),
    namespace: str = Field(default="openagentic", description="Kubernetes namespace")

items.name: web_search
items.description: Search the web using multiple search engines (with automatic fallback).

properties.params:
query: str,
    num_results: int = 10,
    region: str = "wt-wt",
    time_range: Optional[str] = None

items.name: web_fetch
items.description: Fetch a web page and convert it to readable markdown.

properties.params:
url: str,
    extract_links: bool = True,
    max_length: int = 50000,
    use_cache: bool = True

items.name: web_search_and_read
items.description: Search the web and automatically fetch content from the top results.

properties.params:
query: str,
    num_results: int = 3,
    max_content_per_page: int = 10000

items.name: web_verify_fact
items.description: Verify a claim or fact by searching multiple sources.

properties.params:
claim: str,
    num_sources: int = 3

items.name: web_store_knowledge
items.description: Store important information in the knowledge system for future reference.

properties.params:
title: str,
    content: str,
    source_url: Optional[str] = None,
    tags: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    importance: str = "normal"

items.name: web_extract_structured_data
items.description: Extract structured data from a web page (tables, lists, key-value pairs).

properties.params:
url: str,
    data_type: str = "auto"

items.name: web_news_search
items.description: Search for recent news articles on a topic.

properties.params:
query: str,
    num_results: int = 10,
    time_range: str = "w"

items.name: web_help
items.description: Get help on using the OpenAgentic Web MCP tools.
